title: oxandra maya
intro: Oxandra maya, also known as the Mayan nut, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, its name derived from the region where it is commonly found. The plant's seeds have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and pain, and are valued for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Oxandra maya seeds have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the seeds are prepared as a decoction or infusion, and are also used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and capsules.
